divergent_child.mechanism: Use cross-ETF realized-volatility term-structure/breadth states without VIXY/TLT stress-carry sleeves.
divergent_child.title: ETF volatility-term-state breadth allocator

bad_result_policy.note: If rejected, no refinement/extension/direct continuation is suggested.

costs_slippage.handling: Post-cost proxy subtracts 5 bps times estimated one-way daily target-weight turnover.

data_source: Alpaca real OHLCV via qfa/AlpacaGateway; --data-csv not used

db_used.retention_note: Temporary SQLite DBs deleted after qfa JSON capture.

orthogonality.method: Pearson daily equity-return correlation vs retained latest.json curves where available
